name: marens-disappointment
prompt: Close-up. Auburn-haired woman in corridor receiving the non-answer. Disappointment settling over understanding — she'd hoped, she'd known better. Cool corridor light behind her, resignation in her eyes. Background: soft fade to dark, hope dimming. The light going out. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: exchange-between-women
prompt: Two-shot, the two women. Auburn-haired woman in corridor LEFT of frame looking at brunette woman in room RIGHT of frame. Silent understanding passing between them — a question about him, an answer about time. Cool corridor light on LEFT half, warm amber light on RIGHT half. Something communicated that he can see but not interpret. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: the-deadline
prompt: Medium shot. Auburn-haired woman in corridor, final posture — accepting his non-answer. Resolve visible in her stance. Corridor walls behind her, cool blue lighting. Door frame at edge of shot RIGHT. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Maren
dialogue.text: Transport leaves at 0400. After that, the window closes.
